mode.title: Scrape Mode
mode.description: What to capture. "Product + Seller (full)": full product details plus the seller profile, store reviews and product previews. "Product only": product details + reviews only, no seller enrichment. "Seller only": provide STORE URLs in Start URLs — captures the seller profile + store reviews only (no product data).

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs to scrape. For the "Product" modes these are product detail pages (https://www.aliexpress.com/item/<id>.html). For "Seller only" mode these are store pages (https://www.aliexpress.com/store/<id>).

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape (0 = unlimited).

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: How many product pages to scrape in parallel. Keep this low (1-3) for browser + residential-proxy crawls so you stay under AliExpress's rate radar.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max Request Retries
maxRequestRetries.description: How many times a blocked request is retried. Each retry rotates to a fresh session (new residential IP + fingerprint), so give rotation room to find a clean IP.

proxyCountry.title: Proxy Country
proxyCountry.description: Two-letter country code for the Apify residential proxy (matches the en-US fingerprint by default).

headless.title: Headless Browser
headless.description: Run Chrome in headless (new) mode. Disable to run headful via Xvfb, which is harder to detect but uses more resources.
